tests.name: @stynx-nyx/contracts errors AuthenticationError carries the AUTHENTICATION_ERROR code
@stynx-nyx/contracts errors AuthorizationError carries the AUTHORIZATION_ERROR code
@stynx-nyx/contracts errors IdentityAdminError accepts IDENTITY_NOT_FOUND as a code
@stynx-nyx/contracts errors IdentityAdminError accepts IDENTITY_FORBIDDEN as a code
